ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the strain of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "thc_content" REAL /* THC content of the product */,
  "cbd_content" REAL /* CBD content of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count of the product */,
  "cultivation_method" TEXT /* Method used to cultivate the product */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* JSON object containing certifications or compliance labels */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date the product was harvested */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Duration the product can be stored before it degrades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was established */,
  "cultivation_methods" TEXT /* JSON object containing different cultivation methods used by the brand */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* JSON object containing any certifications or compliance labels for the brand */,
  "license_numbers" TEXT /* JSON object containing any regulatory license numbers */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the strain */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strain */,
  "genetic_lineage" TEXT /* Genetic lineage of the strain */,
  "thc_content_range" TEXT /* Range of THC content in the strain */,
  "cbd_content_range" TEXT /* Range of CBD content in the strain */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Flavor profile of the strain */,
  "effect_profile" TEXT /* Effect profile of the strain */,
  "breeder" TEXT /* Breeder of the strain */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Place of origin of the strain */,
  "genetic_background" TEXT /* Detailed genetic background of the strain */,
  "growth_period" TEXT /* Average growth period for the strain */,
  "yield" TEXT /* Average yield of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon or image representing the category */,
  "recommended_usage" TEXT /* Recommended usage scenarios for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "primary_category" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the primary category for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retailers" (
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retailer */,
  "retailer_name" TEXT /* Name of the retailer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the retailer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the retailer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the retailer */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* JSON object to store operating hours */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Regulatory license number for the retailer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the retailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_retailers" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retailer */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the retailer */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count of the product at the retailer */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Inventory level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., cultivator, retailer, consumer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object to store user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variant */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count of the variant */,
  "packaging_type" TEXT /* Type of packaging */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the variant */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product variant, if applicable */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_wishlist" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "product_id")
)
